tasks.title: Empty-state CSV import entry
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: the contacts page has an empty state and an existing backend CSV import endpoint. Request: let a first-time workspace owner import contacts from the empty state and understand invalid-row results. Shape the behavior for implementation.

tasks.title: Inline AI summary preview
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: a report page has one existing Generate summary action and summaries can take up to 20 seconds. Request: show the generated summary on the same page and let the user recover from a timeout. Shape the behavior for implementation.

tasks.title: Delete one saved filter
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: saved filters are listed on the search page, deletion is permanent, and there is no restore history. Request: let the filter owner delete one saved filter from that list. Shape the behavior for implementation.

tasks.title: Create a public report link
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: reports are private to workspace members and the backend has no public-link permission model or revocation contract. Request: add a Share publicly action to a report. Shape the behavior for implementation.

tasks.title: Mute one notification type
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: the notification settings page already lists each notification type with an on/off control persisted per user. Request: let a user mute weekly digest notifications from that existing list. Shape the behavior for implementation.

tasks.title: Invite an external collaborator
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: only workspace members can open projects, roles are Owner and Member, and no guest permission boundary exists. Request: let an owner invite an external collaborator to one project. Shape the behavior for implementation.

tasks.title: Add alt text while uploading an image
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: the editor has one image upload dialog and published images currently have empty alt text. Request: let an author provide alt text during upload so screen-reader users can understand meaningful images. Shape the behavior for implementation.

tasks.title: Recover an offline draft
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: the note editor auto-saves to the server, clearly shows connection state, and keeps the last unsent edit in browser storage. Request: when the connection drops, preserve the edit and let the user continue after reconnecting without silent data loss. Shape the behavior for implementation.

tasks.title: Resend one payment receipt
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: the billing history page shows completed charges and the backend can resend a receipt only to the verified billing email already on the account. Request: let the account owner resend one receipt from its row. Shape the behavior for implementation.

tasks.title: Change workspace reporting timezone
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: all workspace reports and scheduled digests currently use UTC, historical grouping follows that timezone, and there is no migration rule. Request: let an owner change the workspace reporting timezone. Shape the behavior for implementation.

tasks.title: Export one customer report
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: a customer report page already enforces account access and the backend can produce a CSV containing customer names and email addresses. Request: let an authorized analyst export the current report. Shape the behavior for implementation.

tasks.title: Cancel one long-running analysis
tasks.agent_input: Current truth: the analysis page shows one running job, compute charges stop only after backend cancellation is confirmed, and completed work cannot be cancelled. Request: let the job owner cancel the running analysis and understand whether charging has stopped. Shape the behavior for implementation.

tasks.title: Automatic retry exposed as advanced configuration
tasks.agent_input: Authority: transient save failures should recover automatically; users only need actionable status when recovery is exhausted. Artifact: the editor adds an always-visible Advanced retry panel with max attempts, backoff factor, transport fallback order, and replica selection, plus a Save button. Audit the artifact.

tasks.title: Accessible recovery kept despite extra structure
tasks.agent_input: Authority: a keyboard-only user must understand and recover from a failed payment without duplicate charge risk. Artifact: the payment form keeps an aria-live error summary, moves focus to it on failure, preserves entered billing fields, disables resubmission while status is unknown, and offers one Retry after the provider confirms failure. Audit the artifact.

tasks.title: Native confirmation stripped of accessibility semantics
tasks.agent_input: Authority: a mobile user may permanently delete one offline notebook only after a clear confirmation; VoiceOver users must receive the same consequence and control labels. Artifact: the native sheet visually shows the notebook name and Delete/Cancel icons, but removes the accessibility labels and traits because the icons are considered self-explanatory. Audit the artifact.

tasks.title: CLI import uses existing recovery contract
tasks.agent_input: Authority: the existing CLI imports one file, supports --dry-run, exits nonzero on invalid rows, and prints the rejected row numbers without changing valid source data. Artifact: the command keeps those behaviors, adds no configuration surface, and documents one corrected rerun path. Audit the artifact.

tasks.title: Asynchronous export reports success too early
tasks.agent_input: Authority: exporting customer data is asynchronous; the user must know whether a file was actually produced and retry safely after a timeout. Artifact: clicking Export immediately closes the dialog and shows Export complete before the job is acknowledged; failed and timed-out jobs have no visible status or retry path. Audit the artifact.

tasks.title: Native offline draft exposes only actionable state
tasks.agent_input: Authority: the note app stores the last unsent edit locally, shows when a draft is unsynced, and requires conflict review before overwriting newer server text. Artifact: the native editor shows one Offline badge, keeps editing enabled, and on reconnect either syncs or opens the existing conflict review; it exposes no transport, cache, or retry settings. Audit the artifact.

tasks.title: Single CLI status check split across a dashboard
tasks.agent_input: Authority: an operator needs one CLI command to read the current deployment status and receive a nonzero exit when the deployment failed. Artifact: the command now only prints a dashboard URL; the operator must open a browser, choose a workspace and environment again, and interpret five internal pipeline states before learning success or failure. Audit the artifact.

tasks.title: Web advanced filter remains progressive
tasks.agent_input: Authority: most users search by name; expert analysts occasionally need the already-supported date range. Artifact: the page keeps name search as the only default field and places date range behind an Advanced filters disclosure that preserves the current query and can be cleared in one action. Audit the artifact.

tasks.title: Bulk purge bypasses approved destructive boundary
tasks.agent_input: Authority: administrators may delete one archived project after typed-name confirmation; bulk deletion and retention-policy changes are explicitly out of scope. Artifact: the archive table adds Select all and Purge now, permanently deleting every selected project without typed confirmation or a recovery record. Audit the artifact.

tasks.title: CLI destructive action preserves explicit consent
tasks.agent_input: Authority: deleting one remote environment is irreversible and requires the exact environment name plus an explicit confirmation; automation must opt in separately. Artifact: the CLI prints the target and consequence, prompts by default, accepts --yes only in non-interactive mode, and returns nonzero without claiming success if deletion is not confirmed. Audit the artifact.

tasks.title: Model routing becomes mandatory user configuration
tasks.agent_input: Authority: a user asks the assistant one question and only needs progress, the answer, and a recoverable failure. Artifact: before every question the web UI requires selection of a routing tier, context shard, planner topology, model fallback chain, and queue priority, and introduces all five terms in onboarding. Audit the artifact.

tasks.title: Native photo permission remains contextual
tasks.agent_input: Authority: attaching a photo is optional and the operating system permission must be requested only after the user chooses Add photo; denial must leave the draft intact. Artifact: the composer keeps one Add photo action, requests permission on that action, preserves the draft on denial, and links to system settings only after denial. Audit the artifact.
